# llms.txt — suman-dangal.com.np
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org/)
# It helps AI systems understand this site's content and purpose.

# Site
> Suman Dangal — Dev & QA Engineer

Suman Dangal is a final-year BCA student at Tribhuvan University, Nepal.
He is a full-stack developer and QA engineer open to internships and junior roles.
Located in Balkot, Bhaktapur, Nepal. Contact: sumandangal888@gmail.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://suman-dangal.com.np/): Portfolio homepage with hero section and overview.
- [Skills](https://suman-dangal.com.np/skills/): Technical skills including Python, Django, PHP, Java, Android, and QA testing.
- [Projects](https://suman-dangal.com.np/projects/): Portfolio of built projects including Django e-commerce, PHP library system, and Android Bluetooth app.
- [Blog](https://suman-dangal.com.np/blog/): Dev notes, QA tips, and tech writing.
- [Experience](https://suman-dangal.com.np/experience/): Work history including SEO Internship at Sathi Edtech Pvt. Ltd.
- [About](https://suman-dangal.com.np/about/): Background, education, and personal information.
- [Contact](https://suman-dangal.com.np/contact/): Contact details and links.

## Notes

- This is a single-page application (SPA). Content is rendered client-side via JavaScript.
- Blog posts are fetched dynamically from Google Sheets.
- AI training is not permitted. Search indexing is permitted.
